Name: Write to Target Beacon
Description: Writes a comprehension (or batch of records) to a target entity on another DataBeacon via the Ultravisor mesh.

EventInputs.Name: Execute
EventInputs.Description: Write the comprehension to the target beacon

SettingsInputs.Name: BeaconName
SettingsInputs.Description: Target beacon name for mesh routing

SettingsInputs.Name: ConnectionHash
SettingsInputs.Description: URL-safe slug of the target connection name

SettingsInputs.Name: Comprehension
SettingsInputs.Description: Comprehension to write: { Entity: { GUID: record, ... } }
